description: Unique identifier of the ad. Used to map performance metrics back to specific ad creatives. Joins to ad_history.id.
Reporting date for the metrics (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for filtering and trend analysis.
ID of the Facebook Ad Account associated with this ad.
Total number of times the ad appeared on users' screens (not unique viewers).
Total number of link clicks on the ad leading to external destinations such as websites or app stores.
Number of unique users who viewed the ad at least once on that date.
Average cost per inline link click, calculated as spend / inline_link_clicks.
Cost per click, reflecting the average cost of a user clicking any link in the ad.
Cost per thousand impressions (spend / impressions * 1000). Indicates cost efficiency for ad visibility.
Click-through rate percentage, calculated as (clicks / impressions) * 100.
Average number of times a single person saw the ad. Calculated as impressions / reach.
Total money spent on this ad during the reporting period.
Human-readable name of the ad as defined in Facebook Ads Manager.
Name of the ad set that this ad belongs to; helps group ads under shared targeting or budget.
CTR specific to inline link clicks, showing the effectiveness of call-to-action links.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
